programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Lonny loves \.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst QuadDrive
programme.sub-title: Disbanded! The Dark Prince Goes Rough?!
programme.desc: After Rashad nominates Valt, Bel becomes annoyed and runs away. After his battle with Bel, Valt discovers that something is wrong with Valtryek.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Takumi's visit to Yggdrasil Research is interrupted by Karla Konjiki who greets Blaze Fujiwara by parachuting down from the sky. Meanwhile, Multi searches for ideas and inspiration.

programme.title: Lego Friends: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Paisley is fatigued by Olly's obsession with their fame. Zac confronts Olly, It's clear that he's wrapped up in fame and can't see what he's doing.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to crack the code to reveal Lunia's secrets while the Nightmare King presses a full-scale assault on Castle Nocturnia.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Nightmare King begins to open a rift to the Waking World while Mateo presses Oz for the truth about Lunia's battle with the Nightmare King.

programme.title: Beyond The Farm: Men At Work
programme.desc: This week, it's 18-year-old Reuben's first autumn in business and there are lessons for the whole team as they take on a super-sized stonework project.

programme.title: My Way
programme.desc: Come behind the scenes to the kitchens of three South-East Queensland restaurants and meet the chefs whose own unique styles, experiences and culinary expertise has helped them create mouth watering menus.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Following the unexpected postponement of their wedding, George badgers Susan for permission to set up Jerry with her maid of honour, Hallie.

programme.title: IndyCar Highlights
programme.desc: The 2026 NTT IndyCar Series is set to be the 115th official championship season of American open wheel racing and the 31st season under IndyCar Series sanction.

programme.title: Limitless with Chris Hemsworth
programme.desc: Chris discovers how his muscles can help him live longer with an epic rope climb.

programme.title: English Premier League
programme.desc: Nine presents a replay of the 2025/26 Premier League's Chelsea v Man City from Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: The Summit
programme.desc: Fourteen hikers have started the adventure of a lifetime to reach the summit in 14 days - but they're realising not all of them will make it. One hiker has fallen, and they don't have a million dollars anymore.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World
programme.desc: A visionary named Marvin Glass oversees the creation of many of the most iconic toys of the 20th Century. From chattering teeth to a legendary game based on a mouse trap, Glass pushes the boundaries.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World
programme.desc: A Yale educated medical doctor and Olympic gold medalist turns his attention to toys.

programme.title: The Lego Batman Movie
programme.desc: Bruce Wayne must deal with the usual suspects as they plan to rule Gotham City, while discovering that he has accidentally adopted a teenage orphan who wishes to become his sidekick.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The world is beset by the appearance of monstrous creatures, but one of them may be the only one who can save humanity.

programme.title: Enter Sanctum
programme.desc: In a toxic future, a home for the wealthy is constructed on the foundations of a former asylum. The new residents soon face psychological disturbances that once troubled the former occupants.

programme.title: Gotham
programme.desc: A military task force led by Eduardo Dorrance arrives in Gotham. Nygma looks for answers from Penguin, who leads him back to Hugo Strange.

programme.title: Arrow
programme.desc: Oliver deals with the fallout of the explosion on the island.

programme.title: Arrow
programme.desc: Anatoly returns to Star City with a sinister agenda as Oliver tries to balance being the mayor, the Green Arrow and William's father.

programme.title: English Premier League
programme.desc: Nine presents a replay of the 2025/26 Premier League's Chelsea v Man City from Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to crack the code to reveal Lunia's secrets while the Nightmare King presses a full-scale assault on Castle Nocturnia.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Nightmare King begins to open a rift to the Waking World while Mateo presses Oz for the truth about Lunia's battle with the Nightmare King.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: When Baby Terry meets a big dragon, he tries to learn how to do all the things dragons do. / Hop learns that Penny is helping Filipa build a huge statue and he worries.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst QuadDrive
programme.desc: Valt may be winning against Rashad, but it looks like Valtryek is damaged from a previous match; battling with Bey could lead to defeat.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Tenka Shiroboshi appears at Komaba Sushi, demanding a battle with Blader X. Multi is alarmed when Tenka unveils her Bey. The new era of Blading has truly begun!

programme.title: Lego Friends: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Zac seeks advice on how to court Sky. Paisley & Zac make a plan: Paisley will confront Olly, Zac will tell Sky his feelings. Olly disappoints Paisley.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: With their parents away for the night, Barbie, Skipper, and Stacie recruit Ken for an elaborate plan to bring Chelsea's imaginary 'Roof Fairy' to life.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! Our players must use their elf skills to help Santa deliver presents. Will they make it in time to save Christmas?

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Finding the Crown of Control is easier than expected when the team meets the King of the Creatures but extracting it back to Brooklyn is much harder.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran accidently eats Grace's imaginary friend Imogene.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran and the kids prepare to celebrate Christmas alone when Maxwell and CC have to go on a business trip.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.sub-title: The Addams Family and the Spaceman
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Larry asks Sam to help him with a client to modernise his firm.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: After Darrin, in a fit of frustration, says that they should tell everyone about Sam being a witch, she makes him dream about that very situation and the reactions of their friends and the US government.

programme.title: Surfing Australia TV
programme.desc: Showcases Surfing Australia's programs from junior development through to the elite athletes in surfing.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: A trio of Krypton villains threaten havoc on Earth, while Superman and Lois Lane are just becoming involved in a long-awaited love affair - an affair which may cost Superman his superpowers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran accidently eats Grace's imaginary friend Imogene.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran and the kids prepare to celebrate Christmas alone when Maxwell and CC have to go on a business trip.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While George is disturbed by a doll that looks like his mum, his dad searches for a long-lost cousin in Italy.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Following the unexpected postponement of their wedding, George badgers Susan for permission to set up Jerry with her maid of honour, Hallie.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Moriticia's favourite charity is having an auction - so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Aunt Clara falls for Darrin's elderly Japanese client. Samantha tries to locate her boyfriend Ochy.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: While trying to retrieve Tabitha's toy flying saucer, Aunt Clara summons a real flying saucer complete with alien crew.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell convinces Fran to go on a date with a soap opera star to get him to agree to appear in a play.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell's old nanny comes to visit and complains about Fran's job as a nanny.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While shopping for a new crested blazer, Jerry gets out of buying one he doesn't like by claiming he wants to bring a friend to see it.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George gets his boss hooked on calzones, Kramer develops an addiction to freshly dried clothes. Meanwhile, Jerry dates a woman of unusually persuasive beauty, and Elaine falls for a man's clever dating tactics.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Detective Sherlock Holmes and his stalwart partner Watson engage in a battle of wits and brawn with a nemesis whose plot is a threat to all of England.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While shopping for a new crested blazer, Jerry gets out of buying one he doesn't like by claiming he wants to bring a friend to see it.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George gets his boss hooked on calzones, Kramer develops an addiction to freshly dried clothes. Meanwhile, Jerry dates a woman of unusually persuasive beauty, and Elaine falls for a man's clever dating tactics.

programme.title: Love Island All Stars
programme.desc: Maya Jama is a shoulder to cry on as a group of Love Island All Stars return to paradise for the first time ever - ALL hoping that they can find romance the second time around.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: A peek inside the unconventional lives of six successful women navigating an exclusive social circle in a city where religion, status and perfection are praised to the highest degree.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: A peek inside the unconventional lives of six successful women navigating an exclusive social circle in a city where religion, status and perfection are praised to the highest degree.

programme.title: Beyond The Farm: Men At Work
programme.desc: In episode one of this series, we follow 18-year-old Reuben's first summer in business.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: With their parents away for the night, Barbie, Skipper, and Stacie recruit Ken for an elaborate plan to bring Chelsea's imaginary 'Roof Fairy' to life.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: Vivie's upset when her painting gets ruined so Barney takes the kids on a high-seas adventure. / Barney shows Mel the importance of not just respecting nature, but also being a caretaker of it.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Finding the Crown of Control is easier than expected when the team meets the King of the Creatures but extracting it back to Brooklyn is much harder.
